race.comment: PACIFIC MICK (2) looks well placed here on the back of a solid performance at provincial level last time out, finishing 4.6L off the winner. Third-up now, with the rise in trip and drop back to Country level a good move. Wasn't beaten far when in the market over 1200m here last campaign. Looks the one to beat. HOLD MY DRINK (1) missed by 2L on the new Illawarra Grange deck last time out when sitting handy throughout. Up to this trip looks ideal for him here and the booking of Boudvillain makes for good reading. Can notch up his maiden win. PASSING THROUGH (9)  was strong from the front over this course and distance last time out, beaten just 1.9L. Drawn well again this time and drops plenty of weight after the claim of Brookes. Can give them something to chase. ENTRAPMENT (4) has trialled strongly since her fresh run at Kembla when a beaten favourite 29 days ago. Can bounce back. THE ADIGE (5) creates some interest here first-up for the new stable.
